introSection: Good Gravy! is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Holiday World & Splashin' Safari in Santa Claus, Indiana, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The attraction was announced on August 1, 2023.

The first and second cars from the train were unveiled at the 2023 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA in November 2023. It opened on May 11, 2024. The ride re-uses the former Giraffica station building.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a can-shaped tunnel, a giant milk bottle, a giant whisk, a giant chicken timer, and travels backwards.

fullText:
Good Gravy! is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Holiday World & Splashin' Safari in Santa Claus, Indiana, USA.

The attraction was announced on August 1, 2023.

The first and second cars from the train were unveiled at the 2023 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA in November 2023. It opened on May 11, 2024. The ride re-uses the former Giraffica station building.

The ride has a can-shaped tunnel, a giant milk bottle, a giant whisk, a giant chicken timer, and travels backwards.
